positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical woodland creature (e.g., a fox or owl) sitting among vibrant, oversized stylized flora. The style should be a blend of Nordic folk art and modern graphic design, utilizing thick, clean outlines and flat planes of vibrant color (teal, burnt orange, deep forest green). The composition must be central and symmetrical, emphasizing clean silhouettes and high contrast against a light, off-white background, perfect for repeat or single apparel printing. Excellent depth and layering are key. Vector art aesthetic.
negative: photorealistic, hyperdetailed, blur, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, cartoonish, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, cropped, artifacts
